series_metadata.series_description: The Artwork Files consist of all phases of a design job to produce a brochure, catalog, newsletter etc. The Artwork Files include Excel spreadsheets, PowerPoint presentations, Word documents, correspondence, design request and requestor, layout, artwork and proofs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office until no longer of administrative value to agency or superseded, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain the electronic versions (e.g. Universal Document Service, thumb drives, compact disks) until no longer of administrative value to agency or superseded, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
